title: Security and permitted use
summary: This is a browser-side BYOK edition. A browser key cannot be protected like a backend secret.
itemNoRealData: Do not enter identifiable real patient data before institutional review is completed.
itemBrowserRisk: The API Key exists in this tab and may be read by browser extensions or developer tools.
itemNoRepository: The key is not written to the GitHub repository, URL, or this site’s Local Storage.
itemReview: All AI output must be reviewed by a qualified healthcare professional.
consent: I understand these risks and agree to use my own Gemini API Key for closed testing.
errorConsentRequired: Read and accept the BYOK risk notice first.
